response.justification: The candidate shows well over the required 6+ years of full-stack experience with direct, recent use of the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS) in production settings, including pricing systems handling millions of transactions and low-latency microservices. Current hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling matches the JD's AI agent development requirement, and a strong testing/TDD background (including authoring test frameworks and teaching testing courses) aligns with the quality expectations. Gaps are modest: no explicit Nest.js, Vitest, or Playwright experience, and Kotlin exposure is absent, but the breadth and demonstrated ability to pick up tools quickly make these low-risk.
strengths: Deep, recent full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS in production systems at scale
Direct AI-agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) in current role
Strong engineering-quality culture: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, test tooling authorship, and testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, the primary backend framework in the stack
No demonstrated Kotlin experience and only limited Java exposure for the secondary backend services
Significant career investment in DLang, a niche ecosystem with limited direct transfer to the listed stack

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience
